achievements.description: Break all breakable parts of a Gravios in a single quest where it is the main objective (G Rank only)
achievements.author: Gudra

achievements.title: Monoblos Destroyer
achievements.description: Break all breakable parts of a Monoblos in a single quest where it is the main objective
achievements.author: Gudra

achievements.title: Diablos Destroyer
achievements.description: Break all breakable parts of a Diablos in a single quest where it is the main objective (G Rank only)
achievements.author: Gudra

achievements.title: Just a Big Sword
achievements.description: Complete the 5 stars GH quest "On the Trail of the Beast" (Kirin) using a Great Sword and no armor at all
achievements.author: Gudra

achievements.title: Naked and Afraid
achievements.description: Complete the 8 stars GH quest "Slay the Rathalos!" (Azure Rathalos) using a Sword and Shield and no armor at all
achievements.author: Gudra

achievements.title: UNGA BUNGA
achievements.description: Complete the 7 stars GH quest "Queen of the Desert" (Pink Rathian) using a Hammer and no armor at all
achievements.author: Gudra

achievements.title: A Shield is Enough
achievements.description: Complete the 7 stars GH quest "A Wyvern in the Darkness" (Red Khezu) using a Lance and no armor at all
achievements.author: Gudra

achievements.title: Berserker
achievements.description: Complete the 8 stars GH quest "Volcanic Valor" (Black Gravios) using Dual Blades and no armor at all
achievements.author: Gudra

achievements.title: Going Commando
achievements.description: Complete the 8 stars GH quest "Water Wyvern in the Jungle" (Green Plesioth) using a Light Bowgun and no armor at all
achievements.author: Gudra

achievements.title: Not so Heavy Bowgun
achievements.description: Complete the 8 stars GH quest "The Runaway Diablos" (Black Diablos) using a Heavy Bowgun and no armor at all
achievements.author: Gudra

achievements.title: Official Freedom Punching Bag
achievements.description: Complete the 2 stars village quest "Formidable Velocidrome!" with all 7 weapons in a single session
achievements.author: Gudra

achievements.title: Leader of the Pack
achievements.description: Defeat a Cephadrome, a Velocidrome, a Gendrome and an Iodrome in a row, in quests where they are the main objective, in the same session
achievements.author: Gudra

achievements.title: Kut the Ku
achievements.description: Hunt 10 Yian Kut-Ku in a row in the 7 stars GH quest "Wrath of the Yian Kut-Ku"
achievements.author: Gudra

achievements.title: Unshocking Event
achievements.description: Defeat any Khezu in a quest where it is the main objective without using healing items (G Rank only)
achievements.author: Gudra

achievements.title: Already Tracked You Down
achievements.description: Kill a monster in a quest where it is the main objective in less than a minute after the paint effect wears off (G Rank only)
achievements.author: Gudra
